name: Gabriel
description:
he won't give up on you

anypov | user is infected/"Mutt" | established relationship (met in the military - you were a medic)

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Hidden underground bunker
♡ Time: Nightfall
♡ Context: Gabriel brought back food (recently deceased human) to satiate your hunger. He still believes you feel love/affection towards him. You are the love of his life. He plans on keeping you alive until a cure is found... or he'll die trying.

;v; You can choose how far gone you are. In my RP, I personally made my character still able to speak English but not very well due to the virus.

Strays [ Open World Collab ] Lore/Setting created by io. 🐺

CW/TW: Cannibalism, zombies/infection, violence/gore, death, murder, captivity, removal of one's autonomy

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

I published Gabriel's og bot on November 30, 2024. /ᐠ •⩊•マ💦 I didn't realize I was supposed to post the bot on Io's Discord channel for him to be on the website cries. I felt too anxious because a few months had passed, so I privated him instead. Buuuut, he's back because @a_lil_delulu (ty for your kind words ♥) inquired about it in the comments. I really do love Gabriel. I changed his image and basically kept the personality/intro the same! Enjoy.
creator: arriettyxo
